name: Clean
prompt_hint: Use a clean, professional white theme. White background #ffffff, light gray sections #f8f9fa, primary accent #2563eb (blue), dark text #1e293b. Clean sans-serif typography with generous whitespace. Subtle borders and shadows. Modern card-based layout. Use inline CSS in a <style> tag only — no external CDN, no <script> tags.
print_css: @media print { body { font-size: 12pt; } button[id='regenerate'] { display: none !important; } @page { margin: 2cm; size: A4; } }
